title: Neutral Catalog Root Schema
description: Schema for catalog/catalog.json — the marketplace identity, canonical plugin order, and per-target presentation defaults that scripts/generate-manifests.js reads to emit the Claude and Codex distribution artifacts.
$comment: Repo-derived schema, not an official Anthropic or OpenAI schema. The 'targets.codex' shape here (displayName, category, policy) is derived from the July 2026 Codex plugin contract recorded in docs/research/2026-07-16-codex-plugin-contract-spike.md and is expected to evolve as that contract stabilizes upstream.

name.description: Marketplace identifier, spliced verbatim into the generated .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.

version.description: The root catalog track version — distinct from any individual plugin's package.json version.

pluginOrder.description: Canonical 17-plugin order. Both the Claude and Codex emitters filter this order by target enablement rather than storing a separate order per target.

policy.description: Enum values are deliberately narrow to the single policy this pilot exercises (R5); widen when a second policy value is actually needed.

codex.description: Marketplace-wide Codex presentation defaults, required unconditionally: buildCodexMarketplace (scripts/lib/generate/emit-codex.js) dereferences displayName/category/policy even when the Codex plugin list is empty (the committed empty-state artifact still needs a root displayName).
